## Verification

- [ ] `swift build && swift test && swiftlint --strict`
- [ ] Report or screenshot evidence attached when UI, generated reports, or browser-visible artifacts changed

## Security notes

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, `.env`, `.env.*`, `.dev.vars`, or `.dev.vars.*` values were committed
- [ ] Workflow permission or dependency changes are explained

## Project contract

- [ ] Project-start invariant files remain generated, documented, and analyzable
